note: Australian-produced. Grounded in the course's own modules. Founder to review before wiring live.

quizzes.title: CARSI Indoor Environment Assessment Practitioner — Knowledge Check

questions.questionText: Treating the building 'as a system' means…
options: Looking only at the visible mould
Understanding how moisture, air, materials and occupants interact

questions.questionText: A basic indoor-environment assessment typically measures…
options: Temperature, relative humidity, surface moisture and particulates

questions.questionText: When you recognise mould during an assessment you should…
options: Document it and, where beyond your scope, refer for remediation
Objective, evidence-based, and clear about method and limits
Recognising when a finding needs a specialist or laboratory
Communicate where issues are and support the report
